CREATE TABLE threads (id UInt64, data String);
SELECT tid() AS current_thread_id, id FROM threads WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, (SELECT tid() FROM threads WHERE id = t.id) AS thread_id FROM threads t;
SELECT t.id, (SELECT tid() FROM threads WHERE id = t.id) AS thread_id FROM threads t WHERE thread_id IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*), tid() FROM threads GROUP BY tid();
WITH (SELECT tid() FROM threads LIMIT 1) AS thread_info SELECT thread_info, data FROM threads;
SELECT id, data, IF(tid() % 2 = 0, 'Even', 'Odd') AS thread_category FROM threads;
CREATE TABLE more_threads (id UInt64, info String, thread_id UInt64);
INSERT INTO more_threads VALUES (1, 'info1', tid()), (2, 'info2', tid());
SELECT mt.info, (SELECT tid() FROM more_threads WHERE id = mt.id) AS thread_id FROM more_threads mt;
SELECT DISTINCT tid(), id FROM threads;
SELECT id FROM threads WHERE tid() = tid();
